Venue

Questions to ask:

- Is there wireless speakers and sound systems in house?

- Is there a screen or projector?

- Is there an event coordinator on the day of?

- Is there parking?

To Whom it may concern,

I hope this email finds you well!
I am looking for a wedding venue for ceremony and reception for about 40 people in June 2024.
Would you be able to let me know the details of your venue if possible?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Regards,
Mimi

### Makeup Artist

- [table block omitted]

皮肤夏天出油，T区和脸颊。脸颊有一点毛孔。

肤色相对均匀，偏白。

有美人尖但是大脑门。

头发细软但是还算柔顺。

面部比较肉，拍照容易显得胖，是否可以更立体一点。

鼻子不太高，下巴也不突出，也没有突出的眉骨。。。

眼睛还好是双眼皮，但是希望可以突出眼睛和卧蚕。

### Makeup Artist - 妆发

皮肤夏天出油，T区和脸颊。脸颊有一点毛孔。

肤色相对均匀，偏白。

有美人尖但是大脑门。

头发细软但是还算柔顺。

面部比较肉，拍照容易显得胖，是否可以更立体一点。

鼻子不太高，下巴也不突出，也没有突出的眉骨。。。

眼睛还好是双眼皮，但是希望可以突出眼睛和卧蚕。

### Wedding vow and speech

Humorous And heartfelt

- in sickness and in health

- I have never really been keen on getting married because I never found someone that can make me feel that one plus one is better than being on my own.

- After attending more than 6 times and being a bridemaid for three times (apparently once you exceed this number you will never get married), to be perfect honest, I have seen more horrors than happiness in all of these. And that is why I have always been hesitant in getting into marriage.

- I have always asked myself the question, what does it take to say and uphold these vows to someone,

- I am not going to say how much

- It has been a rollercoaster ride to plan this wedding,

- I hope you will Forgive me for wanting to you to give your

- I know you were skeptical about the wedding

- I want you to know that wedding

- I don’t think that marriage is going to be a fairytale, I think it is going to be the biggest undertaking in our lives, besides that of raising a child of course.

- I believe we choose to be with the person that will make us better versions of ourselves.

- I have always believed in hard work, I always believe that we create our own lives based on our own beliefs.

- I may still be the relentless optimist and we will

- I will always honestly, truly, completely love you.

- I have been waiting for you to propose for quite a while, and I swear I almost thought I could never hear it.

- It has been a long journey. To be standing here,

- When we were younger, I thought you were the kind of boy that could never settle

- We are not perfect, or even perfect for each other. But the beauty of marriage is that we do

- 柴米油盐才是每一天，

- There were times when I thought we could never get through another fight, yet here we are. There were times when I felt so hopeless about our future, and you came around to say you were sorry.

- I've realized that you made all those little changes because I told you so.

- When we love, we always strive to become better than we are

- And, when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.

- I am standing here today in front you, in complete sane mind, to promise to love you, treasure you and be with you for the rest of my life.

- We've Read the same books

- When I got older, I've realized that marriage is not just about love, it is a commitment and a responsibility that one is willing to take on to be with another person. it takes courage to say these vows and making it your life's goal. So I am standing here today, witnessed by our family and friends, and being completely sane in my consciousness, that despite all your insolences, I will always, honestly, truly, completely love you.

- It is

- I am completely rational,

- I know you can be

- There is no perfect marriage, there is only the couple who strives to be a better partner.

- I could be anything in the world but I wanted to be yours.

- The object of love is not getting something you want but doing something for the well-being of the one you love.

- I will strive to be a better person everyday, as long as I love you.

- I haven't written anything worthwhile since my thesis, and I controlled my urge ChatGPT to write this vow for me. Funny how life has changed and how rare it is to actually put the time aside for someone.

- So as bad

- I don't think marriage Will be binding us for life, love alone is also not enough, it will be our commitment, humility and willingness to change/selflessness/nurturing that will make this marriage work.

- I want to remember this day not as the happiest day of my life, but the beginning of our Happy life together.

- I want to be able to tell you everyday that, I am

- What I have

- Love is learned, nurtured and

- According to the [dictionary](https://www.lexico.com/en/definition/love), love is "an intense feeling of deep affection." Meanwhile, Urban Dictionary defines love as, "The act of caring and giving to someone else. Having someone's best interest and wellbeing as a priority in your life. To truly love is a very selfless act."

- In this process, I am hoping/willing to be a better person because of love that I want to give. And I will never give up on you as long as

- I saw so much change in you.

- With you, I feel safe, protected and peace. I want us to travel the world, to see incredible sights and to grow old together.

- We are not the perfect couple, but we are perfect for each other.

- I love the way you squint your eyes into a slit whem you laugh

- I love every streak of white in your hair

- Thank you for letting me be a better person and a better partner

- Thank you for wanting to change for me

- We have known each other since high school

- 愿有岁月可回首，且以深情共白头。

- We have compromised so much as a couple in this past few months, you pulled me out of my comfortable by making us practice a wedding dance, when initially I wanted us to sing “love the way you lie”, while you sing Rihanna and I rap.

## Wedding Vow final

## Wedding Speech Final

Long long, as we stand here today, I can't help but reflect on our journey together. To be honest, I was never keen on getting married. After being a bridesmaid three times and attending countless weddings, I saw more disappointments than dreams come true. But when I am with you, one plus one felt better than being on my own.

I think you are very late. I have been waiting to be at this altar since our freshman year in university, when I first asked if you wanted to marry me. Because you were an idiot back then, you did not answer. I swore to myself that I would never ask another person to marry me unless he proposed first.

Ever since we reunited after ten years, I waited so long for you to propose that I almost considered proposing to myself just to speed things up! Then, finally, you did it, under the setting sun in Riverdale Park East, with about a million other people around.

The beautiful thing about life is that when you truly want something, the entire universe conspires to help you achieve it. It is never about what you are; it is about what you could be. I could be anything, but I wanted to be yours.

I will be your friend, your cheerleader, and your rock. We're not perfect, but the beauty of marriage is striving to be better for each other every day. We are not the perfect couple, but we are perfect for each other.

I haven't written anything worthwhile since my thesis, and I resisted the urge to ask ChatGPT to write this vow for me. You know, it is funny how life changes and how rare it is to set time aside for someone. But here I am, doing that just for you.

So here’s to us. To our new journey together. I will always, honestly, truly, and completely love you.

愿有岁月可回首，且以深情共白头.

Wedding Speech

It has been a rollercoaster ride for us planning this wedding. We have fought many times and then made up and then fought some more.

## 礼品Description

彩票 - 沾沾喜气，提”钱”退休

A scratch away from fortune, retire with a jackpot smile.

绿水龟 - 高富帅人手一个，成功人士必备，成功之路，绿影常伴

The pinnacle of success doesn't tick; it turtles in green elegance.

- 这只绿水龟，不仅走得准，还能让你时尚值up up！环保时尚新选择，让你与众不同，成功男女的新宠。

百万美元盖毯 - 百万富翁，躺平人生赢家

梦里富可敌国，醒来全身是钱

Your Million Dollar Dream Come true

After the item is revealed:

- 盖上它，梦金梦，醒来也能富翁。

- "Dream under a million, wake up a winner. Who needs a bank when you've got a blanket?"

赚大钱摆件，金色转盘上面写了钱字 - 赚大钱，“转”大钱

金轮转运，财源滚滚而来

Spin the wheel of fortune, and watch the money roll in.

靠山 - 我是你最坚强的后盾

有我在，你就有靠山

- 有我在，你就有靠山，抱紧我，不怕烦恼闯。

- "Lean on me when times get tough, a cushioned support when life's rough."

总统五件套 - 装B必备，土豪必备

土豪路上，我最闪亮

Bling it on!

Be your own king with a fake gold ring.

答案之书 - 天知地知我知，你不知

万卷书中寻答案，生活谜题一本解

knowledge at your leisure, answers without measure

Birkin小挂件 - 富婆的第一个小目标

The first step to joining the millionaires' club hangs but a trinket away.

- 每个女王都值得拥有她的Birkin，哪怕是个挂件。

- A mini step towards millionaire flair, a Birkin dream hangs in the air.

铁饭碗 - 铁饭碗

饭来张口，安稳一生；铁打职场，碗碗有余

Job security for life

- 这碗不仅能吃饭，还能保你饭碗铁打。

- 英文："More than a bowl for your rice, it's job security for life, oh so nice."

茅台保温杯 - 强身健体，百杯不倒

一杯在手，健康我有；百杯不倒，长寿随我

- 喝了不倒，身体更好

- Health in every sip

### Wedding speech

thank everyone

- I would like to thank everyone for coming.

- My wonderful my family, who came all the way from China.

- My groomsmen, my father and mother in law.

- My best girls and our vendors

- But I would like to thank my husband. For his relentless pursuit, his ignorance in how to be a perfect husband, and his full and complete

- Ever since I started the wedding planning, I wondered what my wedding would be like. As I started planning, it has been an enlightening process. I had to find a venue that is within budget but speaks to me. I had to choose between many things I love in order to decide on only one theme, I had to do lots, and I mean LOTS of hard work to get what I want, I had to accept that not everything will be perfect.

- Somedays I think about what could I do if I had more time, more budget, more skills. But at the end of all this, I've realized that I have the perfect wedding, inspire of all the pain, frustration and sleepless nights.

- I can't wait to start our life as a couple tog

- We Maybe

- I will Truly, completely and love you.

- I have been through a rollercoaster ride with you ever since we first met.

- All jokes aside, you have

- initial skepticism,

- Surround yourself with people who are good in addition to being good at what they do.

- I am honored to be surrounded by the good people hheretoday, thank you all for being part of ourselves and made us who we are.

### Wedding MC Script

Receiving guests

Before ceremony:

Hi everyone, Let's Please get seated in the ceremony area.

At Xpm, play music, wedding procession starts:

- groom and groomsmen

- Bridesmaid

- Bride and father

After ceremony:

Thank you for being part of this beautiful ceremony. Please join us for cocktails and appetizers while the bride and groom take a moment for photographs. The cocktail hour is located at Lago.

Cocktail hour

Please Enjoy o'derves

At 6:20pm:

Good evening everyone, I hope you are enjoying the or'derves, we are going to start our evening dinner reception in the Nest Room at 7:30, please Enjoy the cocktail hours and proceed to the Nest Room at 7:15pm.

The nest room will is located on the second floor, please take the dedicated elevator on the Xxx and you will see the sign up stairs.

As a thanks from our bride and groom, we have prepared 10 well-thought after gifts for our guests tonight. We are not going to tell you what it is inside, but you can choose the gift you want based on its description.

We will start with our first raffle draw of the day, please make sure you have your raffle ticket with you. If you have not submitted your raffle ticket, please put them in the draw box now.

*So the first prize goes to number xxxxx. Please come here to choose your gift.

*You have chosen xxxxx, you can open it now to see what is inside

At 7:15pm:

Good evening everyone, we will start the dinner reception in the Nest Room at 7:30pm, please proceed now to the Nest room.

At Nest Room: playing video

At 7:30pm after all guests are seated:

Welcome back, everyone! Please take your seats at your tables as we prepare to welcome the newlyweds to their celebration dinner. Let’s give a warm welcome to our bride and groom! Everyone, please stand and cheer as they make their grand entrance

At X:XX, starts grand entrance music: Sugar

After couples are seated,

MC says: As we begin our dinner, we'll first hear a toast from the father of the bride, Let's raise our glasses!

Claps

My father's speech

- Welcome the guests he is hosting and thank them for coming

- Welcome the bride's partner into the family and lead the toasts to absent friends and family

- Compliment the bride, tell some heartfelt stories about her and say how proud you are

- Praise the bride's partner and explain why you think they’re such a great couple

- Toast the newlyweds

Father of the groom speech

Bridesmaid speech

Best men speech

After sunset

First draw

Draw:

After dinner:

B&G Speech

MC: Thank you for those heartfelt speeches. Now, It’s time to celebrate on the dance floor. Our bride and groom will lead the way with their first dance.

Mini Bouquet × 20:

- 3 Rose

- 1 Alstroemeria

- 2 Ruscus

- 5 Lily Grass

11 stems

• Stem length: approximately 45 cm to 50 cm (17 in. to 20 in.)

• For short arrangements, a 10 cm × 6 cm (4 in. × 2.5 in.) vase is ideal

- It is best to keep the vase opening in the 5.1 cm to 8.9 cm (2 in. to 3.5 in.) range (per bouquet)

- As the vase height gets taller, a narrower opening works best

### Wedding Vow final

Long long, as we stand here today, I can't help but reflect on our journey together. To be honest, I was never keen on getting married. After being a bridesmaid three times and attending countless weddings, I saw more disappointments than dreams come true. But when I am with you, one plus one felt better than being on my own.

I think you are very late. I have been waiting to be at this altar since our freshman year in university, when I first asked if you wanted to marry me. Because you were an idiot back then, you did not answer. I swore to myself that I would never ask another person to marry me unless he proposed first.

Ever since we reunited after ten years, I waited so long for you to propose that I almost considered proposing to myself just to speed things up! Then, finally, you did it, under the setting sun in Riverdale Park East, with about a million other people around.

The beautiful thing about life is that when you truly want something, the entire universe conspires to help you achieve it. It is never about what you are; it is about what you could be. I could be anything, but I wanted to be yours.

I will be your friend, your cheerleader, and your rock. We're not perfect, but the beauty of marriage is striving to be better for each other every day. We are not the perfect couple, but we are perfect for each other.

I haven't written anything worthwhile since my thesis, and I resisted the urge to ask ChatGPT to write this vow for me. You know, it is funny how life changes and how rare it is to set time aside for someone. But here I am, doing that just for you.

So here’s to us. To our new journey together. I will always, honestly, truly, and completely love you.

愿有岁月可回首，且以深情共白头.

(May we have years to look back on, and may we grow old together with deep affection.)

### Wedding Speech Final

Planning this wedding was like trying to assemble IKEA furniture without instructions. Absolutely nothing about this wedding was easy! But here we are, ready to take on one of the biggest undertakings of our lives.

I am so grateful for everyone who showed up today and celebrate with us. All of you are our most valued people in our lives.

我非常感谢今天出席并和我们一起庆祝的每个人。在座的每一位朋友和家人都是我们生命中最珍贵的人。

首先想感谢我最爱的爸爸妈妈，不光给予了我顽强不息的生命，也教会了我如何去爱，以及做一个值得被爱的人。

我要感谢我的新爸爸，马传起，第一次来到遥远的加拿大是为了我们的婚礼。而且最重要的是, 养育了马龙，让他成为了一个值得我托付终身的人。

我要感谢我的蓓蓓姐姐，我的大姑，还有我可爱的侄子66。你们第一次坐20多小时的飞机，不远万里从中国来参加我的婚礼。你们的到来对我来说比任何礼物都重要。

I want to thank my bridesmaids, Jingjing, Vera and my cousin, You guys have been the most thoughtful, understanding and supportive friends anyone could ever ask for.

I want to thank the groomsmen and everyone who helped to make this venue looking beautiful for our special day.

A very special thanks to our MC Eric, and our DJ/Drone Pilot/Videographer Anran tonight. Eric, thank you for being such a lively and wonderful MC tonight, please try this as a side hustle in the future! And Anran, thank you for you taking on so many roles last minute and done a tremendous job!

And, Last but not least, I want to thank to my husband.

We have compromised so much as a couple in these past few months. You pulled me out of my comfort zone by making us practice a wedding dance, when initially, I wanted us to sing “Love the Way You Lie,” with you singing Rihanna and me as Eminem. I am still terrible at dancing, but you made me a little bit better at it.

In the last few months, we fought and made up and then fought some more. There were times when I thought we'd never get through another fight. But you always came around, and here we are, stronger than ever.

Urban Dictionary defines love as, "The act of caring and giving to someone else. Having someone's best interest and wellbeing as a priority in your life." This definition resonates deeply with me. Love isn't just about the grand gestures, but the small, everyday acts of kindness and care. It is the smell of warm breakfast, the tender hug when I'm stressed, and the shared laughter at the end of a long day. Love is in the little moments that make up our everyday lives.

Marriage isn't a fairytale; it's an adventure that I'm excited to embark on with you.

I love the way you squint your eyes into a slit when you laugh and every streak of white in your hair. I love the way you cooperate with all my crazy ideas. I love your empathy, your kindness, and your unwavering support. Thank you for letting me be a better person and partner.

Here's to many more years of shared dreams, laughter, and countless adventures. I can't wait to see what the future holds for us.

祝愿我们在未来的岁月里，共同分享梦想、欢笑和无数的冒险，一起创造我们的未来。

Cheers干杯！

### Letter to parents

我最爱的粑粑麻麻，

女儿要做一件这辈子最重要的决定，跟一个毫无血缘关系的人组成一个新的家庭。

以前的古人喜欢说嫁出去的女儿，泼出去的水。可是我绝对不是。不光是因为本来Taily的家庭特殊，更多是因为我永远都是你们的宝贝女儿。

麻麻说了，婚礼这天一定不可以太煽情，一定要热闹开心的过。这天明明是庆祝我们的家庭又扩大了，怎么可以伤心呢？

从小在爸爸妈妈的呵护下长大的我，今天终于也组建了自己的家庭。我一直都想告诉爸爸妈妈，谢谢你们把我带到这个世界，爱护我，养育我(虽然小时候总是打我)。其实你们一直都是我的榜样，让我看到努力生活的样子，也一直激励着我做更好的自己。

结了婚的我，只是多了一个身份，但是我还是我，我还是一个独立，自强，勇敢的人。

最后，我最大的愿望就是粑粑麻麻健健康康的在大家庭里快乐的生活，我们永远是最快乐逗比的一家人！

很多很多的爱,

最爱你们的女儿

### First look letter

亲爱的龙龙

在这个对我们最重要的日子里，我想偷偷地告诉你很多心里话。

- how much I thought about you

- We've been through so much

- In sickness and in health, We have been through sickness, and we will stay stronger together in health

- 你不知道我们这次的重聚有多少个巧合？如果我晚了一周回加拿大，如果你不是因为疫情需要离开中东，如果Eric退休了离开的Novatrend，又或者，我无法忍受当时你的状态而愤然离开。一切的如果，都有可能让我们再也不可能走到今天。

- 你不知道我在downtown的每个夜晚里，看着你的睡脸哭过多少次。在你告诉我，你要离开一阵去思考到底要怎么办的时候。我做好了一切心里准备，你会彻底离开，从此我们再无交集。

- 我在你走后立刻开始收拾东西，可能情绪低落到极点是不会哭的。我只是把跟你在一起时偷偷写的日记都发给了你，希望你至少知道，有个人这样卑微的爱着你。

- 我是一个不爱撒娇闹事的人，因为我真的把所有的温柔都留给了你。

- 我一直以为我们的故事就像小说和电影一样，在男女主排除万难之后终于可以幸福的在一起。但是在去年的冬天，我生病了。

- 我无数个夜晚的害怕，担心，等待检验结果的煎熬。我无法想象在你等待医生手术当天的电话时，你是怎样的心情？我们还能一起过多久？我们会不会再也没有了未来？

- 最后上天听到了我们的祈祷，把我完好的带回了你身边。

You deserve someone who loves you with every single beat of his heart, someone who thinks about you constantly, someone who spends every minute of every day just wondering what you're doing, where you are, who you're with and if you're OK. You need someone who can help you reach your dreams and who can protect you from your fears. You need someone who will treat you with respect, love every part of you, especially your flaws.

- 今天在这个对我们最重要的日子里，我想偷偷的告诉你：

### 礼品Description

沾沾喜气，提”钱”退休

A scratch away from fortune, retire with a jackpot smile.

高富帅人手一个，成功人士必备，成功之路，绿影常伴

The pinnacle of success doesn't tick; it turtles in green elegance.

梦里富可敌国，醒来全身是钱

Your Million Dollar Dream Come True

赚大钱，财源滚滚而来

Spin the wheel of fortune, and watch the money roll in.

我是你最坚强的后盾

Lean on me when times get tough, a cushioned support when life's rough.

土豪路上，我最闪亮

Bling it on!

天知地知我知，你不知。 万卷书中寻答案，生活谜题一本解

Knowledge at your leisure, answers without measure

富婆的第一个小目标

The first step to joining the millionaires' club hangs but a trinket away.

饭来张口，安稳一生；铁打职场，碗碗有余

Job security for life

强身健体，百杯不倒

### Wedding Procession

Pre-ceremony

Music:

Tasks:

- groomsmen guides guest to their seats,

- @5:45pm Groomsmen wait in line at lower patio after the officiant

- Best man takes Groom's vow in hand

- Bride and parents, bridemaids stand in line in processional order at top of stairs

- Matron of honor holds bride's vow

- Bridemaids fixes brides' dress

Ceremony starts when music starts playing

Music : come and get your love

Processional: officiant, groom, best man, groomsmen coming out from lower patio entrance

Dance with the beat and stand in order by xxxx

Then music fades

Next song plays: you are the reason

Bridemaids walks down the stairs, xxxxx

At xxx, bride starts walking down the stairs

2mins arrive at the altar

Father and mother if bride sits at the front row

Bride faces the groom

Officiant starts

During exchange vows, matron of honor and best man hand over the vow booklet to bride and groom

After officiant announced you may kiss the bride

*music starts

Kiss the bride

Newly weds dances along the aisle to exit

Bubble gums and confetti

After walking down the aisle, bride and groom goes back to arch for family photos

All other guests go to cocktail hours

Wedding processional:

The officiant

Groom

Groomsmen

Bridesmaids

Maid of honor

Bride With parents

### photos

1. 桌子最右下角的红盘上放餐巾纸

1. 全部的托盘预先装好甜品，等4:30pm后直接搬到楼下
